/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/LocalExecutor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/RemoteSSHExecutor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/ShellTechnique.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/FileModificationTechnique.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/NetworkScanTechnique.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/ProcessEnumTechnique.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/UserEnumTechnique.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/TechniqueFactory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/PlaybookEngine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentinel-red.dir/HtmlReporter.cpp.o" -o sentinel-red  -lyaml-cpp -lssh2
